title: User Bulk Operation Result Schema
description: Result of a bulk user operation (bulk-delete, bulk-add-to-group, bulk-send-activation). Partial success is the contract: each id is processed independently and per-id failures are reported here rather than failing the whole request. Distinct from responses/admin/data_access/bulk_operation_result, which is a counts-only summary with no per-id reasons.

succeeded.description: IDs of users the operation applied to successfully

failed.description: Per-user failures. Every id in the request appears in exactly one of succeeded/failed.

id.description: ID of the user that could not be processed

reason.description: Human-readable reason, shown verbatim to the admin
